---
title: "test_gungnir_calculus_edges.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\test_gungnir_calculus_edges.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.97
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 7.33
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
The `test_gungnir_calculus_edges.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestGungnirCalculusEdges, setUp, test_empty_file_calculus, test_infinite_complexity_clipping, test_null_metric_resilience. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestGungnirCalculusEdges, setUp, test_empty_file_calculus, test_infinite_complexity_clipping, test_null_metric_resilience. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)

### Exports
- `TestGungnirCalculusEdges`
- `setUp`
- `test_empty_file_calculus`
- `test_infinite_complexity_clipping`
- `test_null_metric_resilience`
